text: The department may execute or make agreements, arrangements, or declarations to carry out this chapter.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 6. DRIVERS' LICENSES [12500 - 15326]
### Chapter 7. Commercial Motor Vehicle Safety Program [15200 - 15326]
#### Article 7. Sanctions [15300 - 15326]
##### § 15319

The department may execute or make agreements, arrangements, or declarations to carry out this chapter.

*(Added by Stats. 1988, Ch. 1509, Sec. 9.)*

subsections.text: The department may execute or make agreements, arrangements, or declarations to carry out this chapter.
